TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Si-æugh ki anna ni-mau-naunang ta ti Jesus tou Galilæa, ka ynnang ta teni mou-naunang tou Judea, alei ka kma-ki-ym ta Joden ki pakapatei-eih tyni-æn.
Si-æugh ki anna ni-mau-naunang ta ti Jesus tou Galilæa, ka ynnang ta teni mou-naunang tou Judea, alei ka kma-ki-ym ta Joden ki pakapatei-eih tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ende nae Desen wandelde Jesus in Galilea want hy en wilde Ã­n Judea niet wandelen om dat de Joden hem sochten te DooDen.
After these things Jesus walked in Galilee: for he would not walk in Jewry, because the Jews sought to kill him.
這事以後，耶穌在加利利遊行，不願在猶太遊行，因為猶太人想要殺他。

S.FORM: Ka tou tamang ta Ou-va-vatoug-han ki Joden ki Pat's-raratt'-an.
Ka tou tamang ta Ou-va-vatoug-han ki Joden ki Pat's-raratt'-an.
S.TRANSL: Ende het Feest der Joden [namelick] De [Loof-]Hutten settinge was naby.
Now the Jew's feast of tabernacles was at hand.
當時猶太人的住棚節近了。

S.FORM: Annata ni-k'ma tyni-æn ta tæ'i3-papara tyn, Thgabboul-la hia, mou-koua tou Judea, alei ka kmytt'-al-appa ta Pæhtætæu-tæu-han-nouhou ki ringei oho' ka paam't-ten hou.
Annata ni-k'ma tyni-æn ta tæ'i3-papara tyn, Thgabboul-la hia, mou-koua tou Judea, alei ka kmytt'-al-appa ta Pæhtætæu-tæu-han-nouhou ki ringei oho' ka paam't-ten hou.
S.TRANSL: Soo seyden Dan sijne brorders tot hem Dertreckt ban hier ende gaet henen In Judeam op Dat oock uwe Discipulen uwe wercken mogen aenschonwen die gy doet.
His brethren therefore said unto him, Depart hence, and go into Judaea, that thy disciples also may see the works that thou doest.
耶穌的弟兄就對他說：「你離開這裏上猶太去吧，叫你的門徒也看見你所行的事。

S.FORM: Ka assi mei-ryngei kima-mang tou dung ta ti-mamang, ka maki-mado-appa kmi'ym ki pat-tæ'i-æmæ-'euh matti-mymmia tyni æn.Heirou mei-ryngei kow ki-mamang katta, paka-madou-a paka-mah im-hou-an ki n.
Ka assi mei-ryngei kima-mang tou dung ta ti-mamang, ka maki-mado-appa kmi'ym ki pat-tæ'i-æmæ-'euh matti-mymmia tyni æn.Heirou mei-ryngei kow ki-mamang katta, paka-madou-a paka-mah im-hou-an ki n.
S.TRANSL: Want niemandt en boel yet in't berborgen ende soeckt selbe Dat men opentlick ban hem spreecke. Indien ghy Dese dinghen doet soo openbaert u selben aen De weredt.
For there is no man that doeth any thing in secret, and he himself seeketh to be known openly. If thou do these things, shew thyself to the world.
人要顯揚名聲，沒有在暗處行事的；你如果行這些事，就當將自己顯明給世人看。」

S.FORM: Ka assi-appa ni-tna-mfsing tyni-æn ta tæ'i-apa-para tyn.
Ka assi-appa ni-tna-mfsing tyni-æn ta tæ'i-apa-para tyn.
S.TRANSL: Want oock sijne broederds en geloofden niet in hem.
For neither did his brethren believe in him.
因為連他的弟兄說這話，是因為不信他。

S.FORM: Annatani-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Assi-appa annata kidi-au: ra myhka koua ni-tanang ta kidi-oumi.
Annatani-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Assi-appa annata kidi-au: ra myhka koua ni-tanang ta kidi-oumi.
S.TRANSL: Jesus Dan seyde tot haer Mijnen tijdt en is noch niet:niet :maer uwen tijdt is altijt bereydt
Then Jesus said unto them, My time is not yet come: but your time is alway ready.
耶穌就對他們說：「我的時候還沒有到；你們的時候常是方便的。

S.FORM: Assi ma-lpough mavahier ymoumi-æn tanæi, ra mavahier appajau-an, alei ka pattæ'i-hail-en-nau ki atta, ka mat-te ta pei-rarynga-ryngei tyn.
Assi ma-lpough mavahier ymoumi-æn tanæi, ra mavahier appajau-an, alei ka pattæ'i-hail-en-nau ki atta, ka mat-te ta pei-rarynga-ryngei tyn.
S.TRANSL: De wereldt en Kan ulieden niet Haten maer My hael sy om Dat ick ban De selbe getuyge Dat Hare wercken boos zijn.
The world cannot hate you; but me it hateth, because I testify of it, that the works thereof are evil.
世人不能恨你們，卻是恨我，因為我指證他們所做的事是惡的。

S.FORM: Nda sa-bavau-a taymoumi mou-koua tou 'Ou-vava toug-han katta: assi-appa-mau 'ou-kou-eih tou 'Ou-vavatoug-han, alei ka assi-appa ni-paftæu ta kidi-au.
Nda sa-bavau-a taymoumi mou-koua tou 'Ou-vava toug-han katta: assi-appa-mau 'ou-kou-eih tou 'Ou-vavatoug-han, alei ka assi-appa ni-paftæu ta kidi-au.
S.TRANSL: Gaet ghy-lieden op Dit Feest : ick en gae noch niet op tot Dit Feest Want mijnen tijdt en is noch Niet berbult.
Go ye up unto this feast: I go not up yet unto this feast: for my time is not yet full come.
你們上去過節吧，我現在不上去過這節，因為我的時候還沒有滿。」

S.FORM: Irou ka patt'i-kahan tyn ta mamang k'atta neini-æn, ni-mæyl-li tou Galila.
Irou ka patt'i-kahan tyn ta mamang k'atta neini-æn, ni-mæyl-li tou Galila.
S.TRANSL: Ende als hy dese Dingen tot haer geseght hadde bleef hy in Galilea.
When he had said these words unto them, he abode still in Galilee.
耶穌說了這話，仍舊住在加利利。

S.FORM: Irou-ra tæu-kaha-'to sa-bavau ta tæ'iapapara tyn, anna ta ni-sa-bavauappa ta teni mou-kou-a tou 'Ouvavatoug-han, assi tou pænh, ra mama appa tou dung-ra.
Irou-ra tæu-kaha-'to sa-bavau ta tæ'iapapara tyn, anna ta ni-sa-bavauappa ta teni mou-koua tou 'Ouvavatoug-han, assi tou pænh, ra mama appa tou dung-ra.
S.TRANSL: Maer als sijne broe ders opgegaen waren doe gingh hy oock selbe op tot Het Feest niet opentlick maer alg in't berborgen.
But when his brethren were gone up, then went he also up unto the feast, not openly, but as it were in secret.
但他弟兄上去以後，他也上去過節，不是明去，似乎是暗去的。

S.FORM: Annata ni-kmi'ym tyni-æn ta Joden tou 'Ouvavatoug-han, matta'i kmahynna ki sou, Tou-mang ta teni?
Annata ni-kmi'ym tyni-æn ta Joden tou 'Ouvavatoug-han, matta'i kmahynna ki sou, Tou-mang ta teni?
S.TRANSL: De Joden dan sochten Hem in Het Feest ende seyden Waer is hy?
Then the Jews sought him at the feast, and said, Where is he?
正在節期，猶太人尋找耶穌，說：「他在哪裏？」

S.FORM: Ka madagh hynna ta sasaiing-sang ki mækoilalaulau mattæ'i-mymmia tyni-æn.Nda ni-k'ma ta rarouma, mariang ta teni: ni-k'ma-appa ta rarouma, A sfi:ra pa-tau-rahei ta teni ki mækoilalau-lau.
Ka madagh hynna ta sasaiing-sang ki mækoilalaulau mattæ'i-mymmia tyni-æn.Nda ni-k'ma ta rarouma, mariang ta teni: ni-k'ma-appa ta rarouma, A sfi:ra pa-tau-rahei ta teni ki mækoilalau-lau.
S.TRANSL: Ende Daer was beel gemurmels ban Hem onder de scharen. Sommighe seyden Hy is goet: ende andere seyden Neen : maer hy berleydt de schare.
And there was much murmuring among the people concerning him: for some said, He is a good man: others said, Nay; but he deceiveth the people.
眾人為他紛紛議論，有的說：「他是好人。」有的說：「不然，他是迷惑眾人的。」

S.FORM: Raassi ni-mattæ'iæmægh ta ti mamang mattæ'i-mymmia tyni-æn, -alei ka kahtakout-ten neinkiJodenn.
Raassi ni-mattæ'iæmægh ta ti mamang mattæ'i-mymmia tyni-æn, -alei ka kahtakout-ten neinkiJodenn.
S.TRANSL: Nochtans en sprack niemandt brymoedeliick ban hem om de breese Der Joden.
Howbeit no man spake openly of him for fear of the Jews.
只是沒有人明明地講論他，因為怕猶太人。

S.FORM: Irou ka toukad ta'Ou-va-vatoug-han;ni-fa-bavau ta ti Jesus mou-kouva kiKoua tou ta-ta'md-den ki Alid mahtu-tæuug
Irou ka toukad ta'Ou-va-vatoug-han;ni-fa-bavau ta ti Jesus mou-kouva kiKoua tou ta-ta'md-den ki Alid mahtu-tæuug
S.TRANSL: Doch Doch als het nu in Het middden ban Het Feeat Was aoo gingh Jesus op in Den Tempel ende leerde.
Now about the midst of the feast Jesus went up into the temple, and taught.
到了節期，耶穌上殿裏去教訓人。

S.FORM: Ka ni-mou-rynhgau ta Joden matt'i-k'ma-hynna ki sou, Mavana mama ki mang ta ti atta ki na sasoulat, rou assi-ahau ni-pæhtæutæu-han tyni-æn?
Ka ni-mou-rynhgau ta Joden matt'i-k'ma-hynna ki sou, Mavana mama ki mang ta ti atta ki na sasoulat, rou assi-ahau ni-pæhtæutæu-han tyni-æn?
S.TRANSL: Ende de Joden berwonderden haer seggende Hoe weet dese de Schriften daer Hyse niet gheleert en heeft :
And the Jews marvelled, saying, How knoweth this man letters, having never learned?
猶太人就希奇，說：「這個人沒有學過，怎麼明白書呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-matt'i v'lita ti Jesus k'ma neini-æn, Assi s-jau ta pæh ta tæutæu-en-nau, ra i-tens-appa ka ni-madingi jau-an.
Ni-matt'i v'lita ti Jesus k'ma neini-æn, Assi s-jau ta pæh ta tæutæu-en-nau, ra i-tens-appa ka ni-madingi jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Jesus antwoorde haer ende seyde Mijn leere en is mijne niet maer Des genen die my gesonden heeft.
Jesus answered them, and said, My doctrine is not mine, but his that sent me.
耶穌說：「我的教訓不是我自己的，乃是那差我來者的。

S.FORM: Heirou mamoei ta ti-ma-mang ahkoua ki kamoei-in tyn, kmalang-ah tou pæhtatæu-han k'atta, ma lava ka makka Alid, ma-lava ka pattæ'i-madou-en-nau ta atta masousou.
Heirou mamoei ta ti-ma-mang ahkoua ki kamoei-in tyn, kmalang-ah tou pæhtatæu-han k'atta, ma lava ka makka Alid, ma-lava ka pattæ'i-madou-en-nau ta atta masousou.
S.TRANSL: Soo yemandt wil Des selfs Wille Doen Die sal ban Dese leere bekennen of sy uyt Godt is Dan [of] cik ban my selben sprecke
If any man will do his will, he shall know of the doctrine, whether it be of God, or whether I speak of myself.
人若立志遵着他的旨意行，就必曉得這教訓或是出於上帝，或是我憑着自己說的。

S.FORM: Ti-mamang ta mattæ'i-ma-dou mattæ''i mym-mia tyni-æn, kmi-ym ki louloug-an tyni-æn ma-madou: ra ti-mamang ta kmi-ym ki louloug-ang tyni-æn ka ni-madingi tyni-æn, matiktik ta teni ki sou, ka a'ou-si ki katou-koul-lan tyni-n.

Ti-mamang ta mattæ'i-ma-dou mattæ''i mym-mia tyni-æn, kmi-ym ki louloug-an tyni-æn ma-madou: ra ti-mamang ta kmi-ym ki louloug-ang tyni-æn ka ni-madingi tyni-æn, matiktik ta teni ki sou, ka a'ou-si ki katou-koul-lan tyni-n.
S.TRANSL: Die ban hem-selben speckt soeckt sijn eygen eere : Maer Die De eere soeckt Des genen Die hem ghesonden heest Die is waerachtigh ende geen ongererhtigheyt en is in hem.
He that speaketh of himself seeketh his own glory: but he that seeketh his glory that sent him, the same is true, and no unrighteousness is in him.
人憑着自己說，是求自己的榮耀；惟有求那差他來者的榮耀，這人是真的，在他心裏沒有不義。

S.FORM: Afssi kaua na pæp'æ ti Moses ta Tato-uhko ymoumi-n, ka a-'ou-fita ti-mamang ymoumi-n ka milligh ki Tatouhko? Kau-mang ka ki'ym-nnoumi ki paka-patei-an-ei jau-an.
Afssi kaua na pæp'æ ti Moses ta Tatouhko ymoumi-n, ka a-'ou-fita ti-mamang ymoumi-n ka milligh ki Tatouhko? Kau-mang ka ki'ym-nnoumi ki paka-patei-an-ei jau-an.
S.TRANSL: En heeft Moses u niet de Wet ghegeben ende niemandt ban U En Doet De Wet : Wat soeckt ghy my te dooden :
Did not Moses give you the law, and yet none of you keepeth the law? Why go ye about to kill me?
摩西豈不是傳律法給你們嗎？你們卻沒有一個人守律法。為甚麼想要殺我呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-vili tamæhkoi-lalaulau mattæ'i-k'ma-hynna, A-kou Littou-kow, ti-mangta kmi 'ym ki pakapatei-eih ym hou-an?
Ni-mattæ'i-vili tamæhkoi-lalaulau mattæ'i-k'ma-hynna, Akou Littou-kow, ti-mangta kmi 'ym ki pakapatei-eih ym hou-an?
S.TRANSL: De schare antwoorde ende seyde Ghy hebt Den duy= belbel wie soeckt u te dooDen :
The people answered and said, Thou hast a devil: who goeth about to kill thee?
眾人回答說：「你是被鬼附着了！誰想要殺你？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus k'ma neini-æn, Saäsat ki ryngei ta ni-pam't-au, ka mou-ymmud-kamou mou-rynghgau.
Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus k'ma neini-æn, Saäsat ki ryngei ta ni-pam't-au, ka mou-ymmud-kamou mou-rynghgau.
S.TRANSL: Jesus antwoorde ende seyde tot haer Een Werk hebbe ick gedaen ende ghy berwondert u alle.
Jesus answered and said unto them, I have done one work, and ye all marvel.
耶穌說：「我做了一件事，你們都以為希奇。

S.FORM: Alei kianna pæp'æ ti Moses ymoumi-æn ta Hi-ryttoung-en pahey (assi ka ni-makka-koua ti Moses-an, ra na tou Mamou-mou-appa) ka hi-ryttoung-'nou-mi pahei tou wæi ki Pæ'ihaba-ban.
Alei kianna pæp'æ ti Moses ymoumi-æn ta Hi-ryttoung-en pahey (assi ka ni-makka-koua ti Moses-an, ra na tou Mamou-mou-appa) ka hi-ryttoung-'nou-mi pahei tou wæi ki Pæ'ihaba-ban.
S.TRANSL: Daerom Moses heeft u-lieden De Besijdenisse gegeben ( niet Datse uyt Mose is maer uytden Daderen ) ende ghy befnijdt een mesche op den Sabbath.
Moses therefore gave unto you circumcision; (not because it is of Moses, but of the fathers;) and ye on the sabbath day circumcise a man.
摩西傳割禮給你們（其實不是從摩西起的，乃是從祖先起的），因此你們也在安息日給人行割禮。

S.FORM: Heirou kaâ-balei-in ki ka-'æuloung ka Hi-ryttoung-en pa-hei tou wæi ki Pæ'ï-habab'an, ka asli 'ǣǣu-ka kyrrigh-auh ta na Tatouhko ti Moses, mangale-kau wa-kamou jau-an, ka ni-pæh-tmouk-kau pæh-dæryk-kæh ta kæ'euloung tou wæ'i ki pæ'i-ha-bab-'an?

Heirou kaâ-balei-in ki ka-'æuloung ka Hi-ryttoung-en pa-hei tou wæi ki Pæ'ï-habab'an, ka asli 'ǣǣu-ka kyrrigh-auh ta na Tatouhko ti Moses, mangale-kau wa-kamou jau-an, ka ni-pæh-tmouk-kau pæh-dæryk-kæh ta kæ'euloung tou wæ'i ki pæ'i-ha-bab-'an?
S.TRANSL: Indien een mensche De Besnijdenisse ontsanght op Den Sabbath o Dat De Wet Mosis niet gebroken en worde zijt ghy toornigh op my Dat ick eenen geheelen mensche gesont gemaeckt hebbe op den Sabbath :
If a man on the sabbath day receive circumcision, that the law of Moses should not be broken; are ye angry at me, because I have made a man every whit whole on the sabbath day?
人若在安息日受割禮，免得違背摩西的律法，我在安息日叫一個人全然好了，你們就向我生氣嗎？

S.FORM: Ynna dminding kmaih-kahier tou kak'yt-ta'n ki viung, ra dmungdung-a ki dadung-dung-dung ka matiktik.
Ynna dminding kmaih-kahier tou kak'yt-ta'n ki viung, ra dmungdung-a ki dadung-dung-dung ka matiktik.
S.TRANSL: En oordeelt niet na het aensien maer oordeelt een rechcbeerdigh oordeel.
Judge not according to the appearance, but judge righteous judgment.
不可按外貌斷定是非，總要按公平斷定是非。」

S.FORM: Annata ni-k'ma ta rarouma ka makka Jerusalem, Assi kau-wa ti atta ta k'a k'i'ym-men nein ki pakapatei-eih tyni-æn?
Annata ni-k'ma ta rarouma ka makka Jerusalem, Assi kau-wa ti atta ta k'a k'i'ym-men nein ki pakapatei-eih tyni-æn?
S.TRANSL: Sommighe ban uyt Die ban Jerusulem seyden En is Dese niet Dien sy socken te dooden :
Then said some of them of Jerusalem, Is not this he, whom they seek to kill?
耶路撒冷人中有的說：「這不是他們想要殺的人嗎？

S.FORM: Ka k'ytt-'ei, mattæ'i ding-ding tummuk ki fou, ka-assi nein pou-sou-in ta sasasat ki sou tyni-æn. Mou-dilligh-ato kau wa mou-mhga ta Meisasou ka dilligh ti at-ta ta ti Christus?
Ka k'ytt'ei, mattæ'i ding-ding tummuk ki fou, ka-assi nein pou-sou-in ta sasasat ki sou tyni-æn. Mou-dilligh-ato kau wa mou-mhga ta Meisasou ka dilligh ti at-ta ta ti Christus?
S.TRANSL: Ende siet Hy spreeckt brymoedelick ende sy en segghen hem niet. Souden Nu wel De Obersten waerlick weten Dat dese waerlick is de Christus :
But, lo, he speaketh boldly, and they say nothing unto him. Do the rulers know indeed that this is the very Christ?
你看他還明明地講道，他們也不向他說甚麼，難道官長真知道這是基督嗎？

S.FORM: Ratiattatakavana'nian ka toumang ta ni-pakka-kou-an tyn: Irou-ra ierrou-al-ato ta ti Christus, assi mou-hg'ah ta ti-mamang ki ni-pakka-kou'an tyn.
Ratiattatakavana'nian ka toumang ta ni-pakka-kou-an tyn: Irou-ra ierrou-al-ato ta ti Christus, assi mou-hg'ah ta ti-mamang ki ni-pakka-kou'an tyn.
S.TRANSL: Doch Doch desen weten wy ban waer hy is : maer De Christus wanneer hy komen sal soo en sal niemant weten ban waer hy is.
Howbeit we know this man whence he is: but when Christ cometh, no man knoweth whence he is.
然而，我們知道這個人從哪裏來；只是基督來的時候，沒有人知道他從哪裏來。」

S.FORM: Annata ni-makou-langh ta ti Jesus tou Kouva ki ta-tam-md-den ki Alid, dou mæhtæu-tæuughdou k'ma, Ka kmalang-kamou jau-an, ka kavana'n-noumi ka toumang ta ni-pakka-koua-en-nau: assi koh ni-si-kounnoung mama-dou ierroua, ra matiktik ta teni ki sou ka ni-madingi jau-an, ka asfi-mousi kalang-en ta teni.

Annata ni-makou-langh ta ti Jesus tou Kouva ki ta-tam-md-den ki Alid, dou mæhtæu-tæuughdou k'ma, Ka kmalang-kamou jau-an, ka kavana'n-noumi ka toumang ta ni-pakka-koua-en-nau: assi koh ni-si-kounnoung mama-dou ierroua, ra matiktik ta teni ki sou ka ni-madingi jau-an, ka asfi-mousi kalang-en ta teni.
S.TRANSL: Jesus Dan riep in Den Tempel leerende ende seggende Ende ghy kent my ende ghy weet ban waer ick ben : ende ick en ben ban my selben niet ghekomen maer hy is waerachtigh die my ghesonden heeft welcken ghy-lieden niet en kent.
Then cried Jesus in the temple as he taught, saying, Ye both know me, and ye know whence I am: and I am not come of myself, but he that sent me is true, whom ye know not.
那時，耶穌在殿裏教訓人，大聲說：「你們也知道我，也知道我從哪裏來；我來並不是由於自己。但那差我來的是真的。你們不認識他，

S.FORM: Ra kalang-en-nau tateni, alei ka ni-makka-koua koh tyni-æn,ka ni-madingi ta teni jau-an.
Ra kalang-en-nau tateni, alei ka ni-makka-koua koh tyni-æn,ka ni-madingi ta teni jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Maer ick kenne Hem want ick den ban hem ende hy heeft my gesonden.
But I know him: for I am from him, and he hath sent me.
我卻認識他；因為我是從他來的，他也是差了我來。」

S.FORM: Annata ni-kmi'ym ta neni ki tou-roung-en tyni-æn, ra assi ni-pat koua ta ti-mamang ki rima tyni-æn, alei ka assi-appa ierrou'-ato ta [kidi ki] tæ'lei tyn.
Annata ni-kmi'ym ta neni ki tou-roung-en tyni-æn, ra assi ni-pat koua ta ti-mamang ki rima tyni-æn, alei ka assi-appa ierrou'-ato ta [kidi ki] tæ'lei tyn.
S.TRANSL: Sy sochten hem Dan te grijpen : Maer niemant en sloegh de handt aen hem want sijne uyre En was noch niet gekomen.
Then they sought to take him: but no man laid hands on him, because his hour was not yet come.
他們就想要捉拿耶穌；只是沒有人下手，因為他的時候還沒有到。

S.FORM: Ka mabatoung ki mækoi-lalaulau ta ni-tna-msing tyni-æn, ka ni-koun nein, Irou ka ierrou-il-ato ta ti Christus, si ourou kau-wa madagh ki pou-kidi-en ka pei-ryngei-auh tyn, ki ni-pei-ryn-gei-en ti atta?

Ka mabatoung ki mækoi-lalaulau ta ni-tna-msing tyni-æn, ka ni-koun nein, Irou ka ierrou-il-ato ta ti Christus, si ourou kau-wa madagh ki pou-kidi-en ka pei-ryngei-auh tyn, ki ni-pei-ryn-gei-en ti atta?
S.TRANSL: Ende bele uyt de schare gheloosden in Hem ende seyden Wanneer De Christus sal ghekomen zijn sal hy oock meer teeckenen Doen dan die welcke dese ghedaen heeft :
And many of the people believed on him, and said, When Christ cometh, will he do more miracles than these which this man hath done?
但眾人中間有好些信他的，說：「基督來的時候，他所行的神蹟豈能比這人所行的更多嗎？」

S.FORM: Ni-millingigh ta Fariseen ka mimææurmur ki atta ta makoi-lalaulau mattæ'i-mymmia tyni-æn: ka ni-madingi ta Fariseen ki Tama-p'hik-appa ka si-bavau ki koungcia, ka touroung-an-ei nein tyni-æn.
Ni-millingigh ta Fariseen ka mimææurmur ki atta ta makoi-lalaulau mattæ'i-mymmia tyni-æn: ka ni-madingi ta Fariseen ki Tama-p'hik-appa ka si-bavau ki koungcia, ka touroung-an-ei nein tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: De Phariseen hoorden dat de schare Dit ban hem murmelde : ende de Phari seen ende De Ober-priesters sonden dienaren op dat sy sy hem grijpen souden.
The Pharisees heard that the people murmured such things concerning him; and the Pharisees and the chief priests sent officers to take him.
法利賽人聽見眾人為耶穌這樣紛紛議論，祭司長和法利賽人就打發差役去捉拿他。

S.FORM: Annata ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Assi madallia ki kidi ka mækoi-sal-lah koh ymoumi-æn, ka sahka koua-ahkoh mou-koua tyni-æn ka ni-madingi jau-an.
Annata ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Assi madallia ki kidi ka mækoi-sal-lah koh ymoumi-æn, ka sahka koua-ahkoh mou-koua tyni-æn ka ni-madingi jau-an.
S.TRANSL: . Jesus Dan seyde tot haer Noch eenen kleynen tijo ben ick hy u ende ick gae henen tot den genen die my gesonden Heeft.
Then said Jesus unto them, Yet a little while am I with you, and then I go unto him that sent me.
於是耶穌說：「我還有不多的時候和你們同在，以後就回到差我來的那裏去。

S.FORM: Kmi'ym-ah-kamou jau-an, ra assi-ka mou ma ki-valei-ah: tou æiæ-koua-ei-mau, assi-kamou gma-lpough ierroua.
Kmi'ym-ah-kamou jau-an, ra assi-ka mou ma ki-valei-ah: tou æiæ-koua-ei-mau, assi-kamou gma-lpough ierroua.
S.TRANSL: Ghy sult my soecken ende ghy en sult [my] niet binden : ende Daer ick ben en kondt ghy niet Komen.
Ye shall seek me, and shall not find me: and where I am, thither ye cannot come.
你們要找我，卻找不着；我所在的地方你們不能到。」

S.FORM: Annata ni-maannaunna-dou ki sou ta Joden, Sah-ka-kounn'-ah ta ti atta ka assi-mytta paki-valei-auh ta teni? Mou-kou-a-ah kauwa ta teni ni-papaiävou hak ka Griekken, tou pæhtæu-tæu-'ei' ki Griekken?
Annata ni-maannaunna-dou ki sou ta Joden, Sah-ka-kounn'-ah ta ti atta ka assi-mytta paki-valei-auh ta teni? Mou-kou-a-ah kauwa ta teni ni-papaiävou hak ka Griekken, tou pæhtæu-tæu-'ei' ki Griekken?
S.TRANSL: . De Joden Dan seyden tot malkanderen waer sal dese henen gaen Dat wy hem niet en sullen binden : Sal hy tot De berstroyde Grieken gaen ende De Grieken leeren :
Then said the Jews among themselves, Whither will he go, that we shall not find him? will he go unto the dispersed among the Gentiles, and teach the Gentiles?
猶太人就彼此對問說：「這人要往哪裏去，叫我們找不着呢？難道他要往散住希臘中的猶太人那裏去教訓希臘人嗎？

S.FORM: Ka mang ta sou k'atta ka ni-pa-sousou-en tyn? Kmi'ym-ah-kamou jau-an, râ assi-kamou ma-ki-valei-ah: ka tou æia-koua-ei-mau, assi-kamou gma-lpoug-ah ierroua?
Ka mang ta sou k'atta ka ni-pa-sousou-en tyn? Kmi'ym-ah-kamou jau-an, râ assi-kamou ma-ki-valei-ah: ka tou æia-koua-ei-mau, assi-kamou gma-lpoug-ah ierroua?
S.TRANSL: Wat is Dit boor een reden Die hy geseght heeft : Ghy sult my soecken ende en sult [my] niet binden : ende Daer ick ben en kondt ghy niet komen?
What manner of saying is this that he said, Ye shall seek me, and shall not find me: and where I am, thither ye cannot come?
他說：『你們要找我，卻找不着；我所在的地方，你們不能到』，這話是甚麼意思呢？」

S.FORM: Karou wæ'i ka tou æǣugh ka'Ou-vavatoug-han ki keirang-en, ni-mitouhko ta ti Jesus ka pa-kou-lang-æg-hæn tyn koun, Ti-mamang ta meit'ö, mou-kou-â jau-an myt.
Karou wæ'i ka tou æǣugh ka'Ou-vavatoug-han ki keirang-en, ni-mitouhko ta ti Jesus ka pa-kou-lang-æg-hæn tyn koun, Ti-mamang ta meit'ö, mou-kou-â jau-an myt.
S.TRANSL: . Ende op den laetsten dagh [zijnde] Den grooten [dagh] des Feests stont Jesus ende riep seggende Soo yemandt dorstet Die kome tot my ende drincke.
In the last day, that great day of the feast, Jesus stood and cried, saying, If any man thirst, let him come unto me, and drink.
節期的末日，就是最大之日，耶穌站着高聲說：「人若渴了，可以到我這裏來喝。

S.FORM: Ti-mamang ta tna-mfing jau-an, mama ka pa-sousou-en ta na sasoulat, s'a-s'a-ei ki raloum ka mæuagh smæ-ei-ah makka-rbo ki vouyl tyn.
Ti-mamang ta tna-mfing jau-an, mama ka pa-sousou-en ta na sasoulat, s'a-s'a-ei ki raloum ka mæuagh smæ-ei-ah makka-rbo ki vouyl tyn.
S.TRANSL: . Die in my gelooft gelijckerwihjs De Schrift seght stroomen des lebenden waters sullen uyt sijnen buyck bloeyen.
He that believeth on me, as the scripture hath said, out of his belly shall flow rivers of living water.
信我的人就如經上所說：『從他腹中要流出活水的江河來。』」

S.FORM: .. ( Ka pa-sousou-en tyn ta ·atta mattæi-mymmiaki Joep-panka a-balei-au nein ka tna-msing tyni-æn. Ka a'cu-siappa taJoep-pan ka dilligh matiktik, alei ka assi-appa ni-pou-keirang-en ki ki-dita ti Jesus.)

.. ( Ka pa-sousou-en tyn ta ·atta mattæi-mymmiaki Joep-panka a-balei-au nein ka tna-msing tyni-æn. Ka a'cu-siappa taJoep-pan ka dilligh matiktik, alei ka assi-appa ni-pou-keirang-en ki ki-dita ti Jesus.)
S.TRANSL: (En(Ende dit seyde hy ban den Geest Den welcken ontsangen souden Die in hem gelooden. Want De Heylige Geesl en was noch niet obermits Jesus noch nit ber heerlict en was.)
(But this spake he of the Spirit, which they that believe on him should receive: for the Holy Ghost was not yet given; because that Jesus was not yet glorified.)
耶穌這話是指着信他之人要受聖靈說的。那時還沒有賜下聖靈來，因為耶穌尚未得着榮耀。

S.FORM: Mabatoung ki makoi-la-laulau ka mi-ling-uh ki sou k'atta ni-k'ma, D'llighti attata Tama-mattæ'i-tan kanna.
Mabatoung ki makoi-lalaulau ka mi-ling-uh ki sou k'atta ni-k'ma, D'llighti attata Tama-mattæ'i-tan kanna.
S.TRANSL: . Deele Dan uyt De schare dese reden hoorende seyden Dese is waerlick De Propheet.
Many of the people therefore, when they heard this saying, said, Of a truth this is the Prophet.
眾人聽見這話，有的說：「這真是那先知。」

S.FORM: Ni-k''ma ta rarbuma, Ti atta ta ti Christuss Ra ni-k'ma tarrarouma, Makka-kou-ah kau-wa ki Galilæa ta ti Christus?
Ni-k''ma ta rarbuma, Ti atta ta ti Christuss Ra ni-k'ma tarrarouma, Makka-kou-ah kau-wa ki Galilæa ta ti Christus?
S.TRANSL: Andere seyden Dese is de Christus. Ende andere seyden Sal Dan De CHristus uyt Galilea komen :
Others said, This is the Christ. But some said, Shall Christ come out of Galilee?
有的說：「這是基督。」但也有的說：「基督豈是從加利利出來的嗎？

S.FORM: Assi kauwa kmaih-kem-ma-hynna ta na sa soulat, ka ier-rou-ah ta ti Christus makka'æp tiDavid, makka euma ki Bethle-hem, tou ni æia-koua-an ti David?
Assi kauwa kmaih-kem-ma-hynna ta na sa soulat, ka ier-rou-ah ta ti Christus makka'æp tiDavid, makka euma ki Bethle-hem, tou ni æia-koua-an ti David?
S.TRANSL: En seght De Schrist niet Dat De Christus komen sal uyt den zade Dabids ende ban het bleck Bethlehem daer Dabod was :
Hath not the scripture said, That Christ cometh of the seed of David, and out of the town of Bethlehem, where David was?
經上豈不是說『基督是大衛的後裔，從大衛本鄉伯利恆出來的』嗎？」

S.FORM: Annata ni-mæmæu-dou-ha ta fou ki mækoilalaulau alei tyni-æn.
Annata ni-mæmæu-dou-ha ta fou ki mækoilalaulau alei tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Daer wierdt Dan tweedracht onder De schare om synent wille.
So there was a division among the people because of him.
於是眾人因着耶穌起了紛爭。

S.FORM: Ra rarouma neini-æn ta ni-mamoei tmouroung tyniæn:rs asfi ni-pat-koua ta ti-mamang ki rima tyni-æn.
Ra rarouma neini-æn ta ni-mamoei tmouroung tyniæn:rs asfi ni-pat-koua ta ti-mamang ki rima tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ende sommige ban Haer wilden hem grijpen: maer niemandt en slogh De handen aen hem.
And some of them would have taken him; but no man laid hands on him.
其中有人要捉拿他，只是無人下手。

S.FORM: Annata ni -sah-kakoua takoungeia mou-koua ki Tama-P'h'ik ka si-bavau ki Fariseen-ap-pa: neni-ra ta ni-k'ma neini-æn, Ka ouman ka assi-kamou ni-mad tyni-æn?
Annata ni -sah-kakoua takoungeia mou-koua ki Tama-P'h'ik ka si-bavau ki Fariseen-appa: neni-ra ta ni-k'ma neini-æn, Ka ouman ka assi-kamou ni-mad tyni-æn?
S.TRANSL: . De Dienaers Dan wuamen tot De Ober-priesters ende Phariseen : ende Die seyden tot Haer Waerom en hebt ghy hem niet gebracht :
Then came the officers to the chief priests and Pharisees; and they said unto them, Why have ye not brought him?
差役回到祭司長和法利賽人那裏。他們對差役說：「你們為甚麼沒有帶他來呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta koung-cia, Myhka koua assi ni-mattæ'i-kma hynna ki fou ta ka'æuloung, mama ki voual k'anna.
Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta koung-cia, Myhka koua assi ni-mattæ'i-kma hynna ki fou ta ka'æuloung, mama ki voual k'anna.
S.TRANSL: De dienaers antwoordden noyt en heeft een menmensche also gesproken ge= liick dese mensche.
The officers answered, Never man spake like this man.
差役回答說：「從來沒有像他這樣說話的！」

S.FORM: Râ ni-mattæ'i-v'lli neini-æn ta Fariseen, Pa-tau-ra hei-en-ato-kamou kauwa ta ymoumi?
Râ ni-mattæ'i-v'lli neini-æn ta Fariseen, Pa-tau-ra hei-en-ato-kamou kauwa ta ymoumi?
S.TRANSL: De Phariseen dan antwoordden haer Zijt oock ghy lieden berleydt :
Then answered them the Pharisees, Are ye also deceived?
法利賽人說：「你們也受了迷惑嗎？

S.FORM: Ni-tna-'msing kauwa tyni-æn ta ti-mamang ki Meisasou, ti-mamang lava ka na Fariseen?
Ni-tna-'msing kauwa tyni-æn ta ti-mamang ki Meisasou, ti-mamang lava ka na Fariseen?
S.TRANSL: Heeft yemandt uyt de Oberste in Hem gelooft ofte uyt De Phariseen :
Have any of the rulers or of the Pharisees believed on him?
官長或是法利賽人豈有信他的呢？

S.FORM: Râ maköi-lalaulau k'atta ka assi mavana ki Tatouhko, pah-kou-avang-hen-ato.
Râ maköi-lalaulau k'atta ka assi mavana ki Tatouhko, pah-kou-avang-hen-ato.
S.TRANSL: Maer dese schare die de Wet niet en weet is berbloeckt.
But this people who knoweth not the law are cursed.
但這些不明白律法的百姓是被咒詛的！」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Nikodemus neini-æn, tenika ni-ierrou'-ato ka euvanan tyni-æn, ka saät ta teni neini-æn,
Ni-k'ma ta ti Nikodemus neini-æn, tenika ni-ierrou'-ato ka euvanan tyni-æn, ka saät ta teni neini-æn,
S.TRANSL: Nicodemus seyde tot haer welcke Des nachts tot hem gekomen was zijnde een uyt haer
Nicodemus saith unto them, (he that came to Jesus by night, being one of them,)
內中有尼哥德慕，就是從前去見耶穌的，對他們說：

S.FORM: Dmungdung kauwa ta Tatouhko-eta ki ta'u, rou assi-ap-pa ni-millingigh tyni-æn, mou-mhga mang ta na ryngei-tyn?
Dmungdung kauwa ta Tatouhko-eta ki ta'u, rou assi-appa ni-millingigh tyni-æn, mou-mhga mang ta na ryngei-tyn?
S.TRANSL: Oordeelt oock onse Wet den mensche Het en zy danse eerst ban hem gehoort heeft ende berstaet wat Hy Doet :
Doth our law judge any man, before it hear him, and know what he doeth?
「不先聽本人的口供，不知道他所做的事，難道我們的律法還定他的罪嗎？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'llli ta neni k'ma tyni-æn, Makka Galilæa-appa kow kauwa ta ymhou? Ma-ki-riang-â kmi'ym ka kmytt-â, ka assi ni-æhpit-ato ta ti-mamang ki na Tama-mattæ'i-tan ka makka Galilæa.
Ni-mattæ'i-v'llli ta neni k'ma tyni-æn, Makka Galilæa-appa kow kauwa ta ymhou? Ma-ki-riang-â kmi'ym ka kmytt-â, ka assi ni-æhpit-ato ta ti-mamang ki na Tama-mattæ'i-tan ka makka Galilæa.
S.TRANSL: Sy antwoordden enDe seyden tot hem Zijt ghy ooch uyt Galilea : Onder: soeckt ende siet dat uyt Galilea geen Propheet opgestaen en is.
They answered and said unto him, Art thou also of Galilee? Search, and look: for out of Galilee ariseth no prophet.
他們回答說：「你也是出於加利利嗎？你且去查考，就可知道加利利沒有出過先知。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-sah-kakoua ta maih-bovoua-vou al sa-da d'lligh ki ta-lagh tyn.
Ka ni-sah-kakoua ta maih-bovoua-vou al sa-da d'lligh ki ta-lagh tyn.
S.TRANSL: Ende een yegelick gigh henen na sijn huys.
And every man went unto his own house.
